name: Echoing Erotica
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: [AttackerName] continues to relentlessly kiss [TargetName] in a tightly sealed, deep liplock, twirling and intertwining their tongues together in a delightfully intimate ballet, all while echoes of her fervid cooing, kissing, and licking magically flow into [TargetHisOrHer] ears in a captivatingly rhythmic, lusty serenade.
miss: [AttackerName] continues to relentlessly kiss [TargetName] in a tightly sealed, deep liplock, twirling and intertwining their tongues together in a delightfully intimate ballet, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to endure the passionate makeout!
statusOutcome: Amid the passionate kissing, the ethereal chorus of sultry mouth sounds resonates in [TargetName]'s head like a softly thumping beat, swirling up [TargetHisOrHer] thoughts like putty until the heart-stirring music and smooches blissfully melt together, combining into an all-encompassing, inner massage that erodes away at [TargetHisOrHer] willpower...
